name: Autumn Fruited Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Flour mixed in a plastic bag with a little salt and pepper
Vegetable oil and butter for frying
2 Each fresh pears and apples (peeled and quartered, rinsed in lemon water)
1/4 cup (or less) water or chicken stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Shake the chicken pieces in a plastic bag with flour, salt, and pepper until lightly dusted.
2. Brown the chicken in a little oil with melted butter.
3. Pour the brandy over the chicken and flame until set aside.
4. Saute the onion and garlic, adding more oil/butter to the pan if needed.
5. Place the chicken, onion mixture, mushrooms, and wine in a baking dish.
6. Add pears and apples.
7. Bake, covered, at 350 degrees F. for 30 minutes or until the chicken is done.
8. Remove the chicken and fruit to a heated platter.
9. Thicken the sauce with cornstarch mixed with a little water or chicken stock.
10. Adjust seasonings.
11. Serve over couscous, noodles, or rice.
